results.title: America’s 250th birthday is on sale. Where’s all that merch money going?
results.description: WASHINGTON — What’s more American than apple pie? Capitalism. And an array of merchandise and influence is on sale for the 250th birthday of the United States. An America250 $275 Liberty Lux American Prosperity decorative throw pillow, anyone? How about a $25 Freedom 250 youth tee? America250, a commission created by Congress a decade ago, and [...]

results.title: Supreme Court unanimously agrees with Alvin Sharp; upholds his decision to free man wrongfully prosecuted
